failure.error_msg:
=== BoseRV Test Results: 14 instruction(s) FAILED === FAIL [SLL] x6: expected 160, got 10 FAIL [SLT] x7: expected 1, got 0 FAIL [XOR] x9: expected 10, got 20 FAIL [SRL] x10: expected 0, got 20 FAIL [SRA] x11: expected 4294967295, got 0 FAIL [OR] x12: expected 15, got 20 FAIL [AND] x13: expected 5, got 20 FAIL [SLLI] x19: expected 20, got 7 FAIL [SRLI] x20: expected 7, got 16 FAIL [SRAI] x21: expected 4294967293, got 1020 FAIL [LW/SW] x22: expected 4294967293, got 1020 FAIL [LUI] x23: expected 4096, got 0 FAIL [AUIPC] x24: expected 4188, got 0 FAIL [JAL Link] x26: expected 152, got 0
assert False
